NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ALI REZAIAN DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND FOR PLAINTIFF TO PLEAD FACTS SHOWING WHY BUSINESS AND PROFESSIONS CODE SECTION 17918 DOES NOT APPLY; SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND FOR PLAINTIFF TO PLEAD FACTS SHOWING THAT THE FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION IS NOT BARRED BY THE APPLICABLE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS; OVERRULED ON ALL OTHER GROUNDS. IT CANNOT BE DETERMINED FROM THE FACE OF THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT THAT THE CLAIMS ARE BARRED BY THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS OR THE STATUE OF FRAUDS OR THAT PLAINTIFF LACKS STANDING. THE ALLEGATIONS ARE SUFFICIENTLY CERTAIN AND DEFENDANT RAISES FACTUAL ISSUES THAT CANNOT BE DETERMINED ON DEMURRER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-09-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT'S ALI REZAIAN'S DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT - The Court overrules the demurrer. Reading the third amended complaint liberally as required by Civil Procedure Code section 452, Paragraph 3.4.1 of the third amended complaint alleges that the cause of action accrued when "Plaintiff learned that Taghi Rezaian died in April of 2011." ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-07-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT ALI REZAIAN DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is Sustained with leave to amend on statute of limitations grounds and overruled on all other grounds. Plaintiff is given leave to amend to plead when the first cause of action accrued, i.e. when the breach of oral contract occurred or was discovered. Plaintiff has otherwise sufficiently pled his complaint against this Defendant. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-15-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT ALI REZAIAN DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to plead facts showing why Business and Professions Code section 17918 does not apply; sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to plead facts showing that the first cause of action is not barred by the applicable statute of limitations; overruled on all other grounds. It cannot be determined from the face of the First Amended Complaint that the claims are barred by the statute of limitations or the statue of frauds or that Plaintiff lacks standing. The allegations are sufficiently certain and Defendant raises factual issues that cannot be determined on demurrer. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
